entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content: I am new to the community. Loved this content.

entry.title: Re: Connecting UI5 Components in BTP CloudFoundry in the same space
entry.content:
The html5 app repo and the app are connected through destinations in a destination service instance on space level. The html5 app repo will only find the app which has destinations configured. If both apps are connected, they need to be in the same destination service. Otherwise one html5 app repo will only find html5 app that is in destination but not the other one.

I don't know if there is any official documentation. I got this information via an SAP note I created.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Belgium 2024 – Call for Speakers
entry.content:
We are organizing an SAP Inside Track in Belgium on September 21th!

 

What?

An SAP Inside Track is a local grassroots community event where SAP Community members come together to share knowledge about SAP related topics. The event is driven/organized by the community, low-cost, often sponsored or even free and very informal: everyone who is interested may take part. There are no rules, but below guidelines and recommendations can help you to set up an SAP Inside Track. Everyone can profit or contribute: act as presenter, take part in discussions, exchange information, realize networking or enjoy the social get-togethers in the evening. Organizing a SIT may seem like a big task, but with the help of this page and some SAP Community Network friends, it can be done with relatively little effort and with a large impact.

 

When?

September 21th, 2024

 

Where?

ARHS Developments Belgium office: Ikaroslaan, Zaventem, Belgium

Next to the airport of Brussels, feel free to come by plane 😊

 

Agenda?

This is an SAP Community event from SAP Community members for SAP Community members filled with sessions by SAP Community members.

We need you for our agenda! This is your moment to share anything you like with the SAP Community in Belgium!

Submit your session here: https://forms.gle/9jHao78a3ZvTWU5R9 

(Please, also register for the event. This makes our logistics easier.)

After we received your submission the team will make up the agenda and come back  to you. We will keep the submission open until one month before the event so don’t wait too long 😉 The earlier we can make the agenda the earlier we can share it with you!

Already a big thanks to the team behind SIT Belgium 2022 that will make up the agenda: @trottiers , @JeremyCoppey , @geert-janklaps  and myself. 

 

Registration

No session, still welcome to join us! Register now here: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-inside-track/sap-inside-track-belgium-2024/ec-p/13676523#M163 

 

More information

Announcement post: https://community.sap.com/t5/brussels-blog-posts/step-back-in-time-with-sap-inside-track-belgium-2024/ba-p/13684786 

SAP Inside Track Belgium Website: SAP Inside Track Belgium (fiddle.be)

entry.title: How to Enable Multiple Selection Mode in a Data Table in SAP MDK?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm working on a SAP MDK project where I need to create a table with multiple columns, similar to the sap.m. Table in Fiori, and enable multiple selection mode. So far, I've managed to create a Table with several columns using the Sectioned Data Table control. 

Problem:

I need to enable a selection mode where users can select multiple rows in this Data Table. I have looked into the available options in SAP MDK, but I have not found a straightforward way to enable multiple selection mode in the current control.

Questions:

  1. Is there any alternative control in SAP MDK that allows the creation of a table with multiple columns and supports multiple selection mode?
  2. If this is a limitation with the current Data Table control, what would be the best way to overcome it?
  3. Are there any workarounds or custom implementations that could help achieve this functionality?

I appreciate any suggestions or guidance from the community on how to achieve this.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Sorting in Editable smart table
entry.content:
One of the principles of Fiori framework in conjunction with SADL and Hana DB is "code pushdown". When you bind a smart-table with a CDS view or a table, the sorting, pagination, filtering all happens at the database layer, not the UI. Every time the user adds a filter, or changes the sorting, or pages down through the data, the engine needs to re-execute the CDS view, and bring back the top 20 records (or whatever # the request specifies).

So if the newly entered data is not stored in the database, the re-execution of the query will not include them.

Have you implemented Draft handling? In a draft enabled scenario as soon as the user leaves an enterable field the value of the field is saved in the draft record. So if you re-sort the result will include the new content.

If you don't have draft-handling, then perhaps you can trap the sorting event in the controller and if in edit mode don't let it sort, ie. don't to a binding update.

entry.title: Re: Automatic clearing of bank interim account for outgoi...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

can you have a look on the Reprocess Bank Statement Item, if the DME number is saved in the field Check? If not, this is the reason why the 019 interpretation algorithm doesn't work. My proposal is to use the 419 algorithm instead, as it has a better fallback logic, which would also check the memo line for the DME number. But also in this case, you need the number to be either in the memo line or the check field.

You find an overview about the algorithms here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/3cb1182b4a184bdd93f8d62e3f1f0741/4dc5efb40c381c36e10000000a42189b.html

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: Unable to reverse supplier invoice
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Have you tried to maintain the Business Place in the configuration and then reverse the invoice again? 

More information about it in the help portal: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/60a09f68f2444ceca31dcac2e7017945/7c8dc760a9b5479a959fc57c20be01d4.html

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: Enhancement for availability check in material reserv...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

please have a look on any of these exits:

MBCF0002 Customer function exit: Segment text in material doc. item

MBCF0005 Material document item for goods receipt/issue slip

MBCF0006 Customer function for WBS element

MBCF0007 Customer function exit: Updating a reservation

MBCF0009 Filling the storage location field

MBCF0010 Customer exit: Create reservation BAPI_RESERVATION_CREATE1

MBCF0011 Read from RESB and RKPF for print list in MB26

MB_CF001 Customer Function Exit in the Case of Updating a Mat. Doc.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: Audit LMS Administrators
entry.content: Marie, I decided to use the Customer Usage Details report. It does not show the specific administrators that have logged in, but it does show details about total admin and unique admin login. Really would be nice to see who those users are.

Optimization problem contains 22 variables

Optimization problem contains 0 discrete variables

Optimization problem contains 9 linear constraints

It will be really helpful if someone can explain the calculation with some example.

 

SAP Integrated Business Planning for sales and operations 

Regards,

Srikant

entry.title: Boosting Capabilities: Extensibility for SAP Companion in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
SAP Analytics Cloud is an all-in-one cloud platform that integrates business intelligence, planning, and predictive analytics. It provides real-time insights, business-driven data discovery, and seamless collaboration capabilities, allowing organizations to make informed, data-driven decisions. With SAP Analytics Cloud, businesses can unite their data in one secure and fully managed environment, enabling users to create dynamic, interactive dashboards, perform powerful data exploration, and run ad-hoc reporting with ease.

Partnered with tools like SAP Companion, a core module of the SAP Enable Now solution, SAP continues to provide comprehensive training, continuous learning, and in-app support to end-users. Further embracing this tradition of innovation, SAP Companion is now extending its expertise to SAP Analytics Cloud, the Data & Analytics cloud service offering from SAP.

On top of the standard embedded content provided by SAP for a while now (read more here), SAP Companion now comes with extensibility options. This means customers can create their own custom enablement content on top of what SAP provides out of the box!

SAP Companion for SAP Analytics Cloud

Available for release this year, the SAP Companion for SAP Analytics Cloud ensures you have a helping hand who provides you quick tips and guidance, always keeping you up-to-date with changes. It eliminates the need to navigate away from the application to access help content or user assistance, thereby significantly improving user experience. Key enhancements include:

Contextual Hotspot Help Content: Now, users can use "hotspots" to easily navigate their way around the user interface. When a hotspot is selected, it provides a summary explanation along with full help topics on the SAP Help Portal for a more detailed understanding.

Embedded Video Tutorials: Instead of just relying on help text, users can now watch embedded video tutorials related to their active screen. These videos can be viewed in a popover without leaving the application, enhancing the learning experience.

Interactive Tutorials: The new update features custom interactive tutorials that allow for self-directed learning. Users can directly engage with screen-related scenarios in a recorded system environment, boosting their familiarity with the SAP Analytics Cloud tools.

Quick Overview of Updates with What's New: SAP Companion for SAP Analytics Cloud provides concise summaries of updates about new or changed features in recent releases, ensuring you are always informed about the latest enhancements.

Direct Links to Full Documentation: For a deeper dive into the specific features, direct links to relevant full help sections on the SAP Help Portal are available.

How can you benefit?

You can benefit from these improvements directly by setting up your own custom content for SAP Analytics Cloud. Follow the instructions in the SAP Companion Integration Guide to set up your custom in-app help for SAP Analytics Cloud (remember that an SAP Enable Now license is needed).

Here are the steps you need to follow:

  1. Create an SAP Companion configuration for SAP Analytics Cloud in your Manager based on the script template already available
  2. Set your settings a necessary, taking care to check specifically for tracking, translation, and custom content settings
  3. Copy the configuration URL out of the Manager using the link symbol on the very right:

  1. Link your SAP Analytics Cloud instance to your SAP Enable Now configuration by logging in to SAP Analytics Cloud and then navigating to System > Administration > Custom Companion URL and pasting in the configuration URL.

The SAP Companion Integration Guide covers steps 1-3. There’s no need to reach out to SAP Analytics Cloud support for #4, simply add the URL yourself or ask your admin to do it for you if you don’t have access to the administration settings.

SAP Analytics Cloud and Continuous Learning

These updates to SAP Analytics Cloud provide powerful learning tools for all users, regardless of whether they are beginners or experienced. The proficiency levels achieved using the updated SAP Companion significantly simplify the discovery of relevant help information.

With SAP Companion for SAP Analytics Cloud, users get basic information via contextual popovers while links to full SAP Help Portal documentation ensure a deeper understanding of technical requirements. In the upcoming Q2 2024 release all these features are planned to be available to SAP Analytics Cloud users operating on a quarterly release cycle.

In conclusion, users of SAP solutions can benefit hugely from SAP Companion’s extensibility, including its application to SAP Analytics Cloud. Improved user experience and heightened adoption amplify the benefits associated with deployed applications. If you’re interested in learning how to improve your SAP systems' user experience, consider connecting with your SAP representative today.

entry.title: Re: Get the multiple records from datastore in SAP CPI
entry.content:
The limitation seems still existing. 

One can retrieve all entries from all datastores in one request or only one single entry.

With the MPL - attachments you can use "skip" and "top", can filter by iFlow(artifact), datetime, status. Any enhanced filter selecting for the DataStore-ID would be helpful.

entry.title: Unable to list or upload data to SAP ObjectStore provisioned S3 Bucket
entry.content:
Tutorial I am following :- Ingest Live Data into your House Price Predictor with SAP AI Core | SAP Tutorials

I am trying out a simple House price prediction Tutorial by SAP on BTP using the AI Core service. I want to upload the training data to #Object Store on SAP BTP #, so I create an instance of it and generate service keys. The Object Store provisions an AWS S3 Bucket and provide access_key_id, bucket name and other important stuff in the key.

I Download the AWS CLI, then use

aws configure


then provide all the details provided by the service key. Then I use

aws s3 cp train.csv s3://<BUCKET_NAME>/example-dataset/house-price-toy/data/jan/train.csv


the command above gives SSL: CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED, so tried to download and store the certificate using openssl but it gave error as well, so ultimately resorted to --no-verify-ssl option (unsafe I know).

when trying to use 

aws s3 ls


It gives "An error occurred (AccessDenied) when calling the ListBuckets operation: Access Denied"
when uploading with --no-ssl-verify option it gives
upload Failed: An error occurred (403) when calling the PutObject operation: Forbidden

 

Note: I am working behind a corporate Proxy.

I dont even have a clue on where to check the IAM permissions since the bucket is provisioned by SAP.

entry.content:

You can also refer to this video, which might answer your questions: 

this video clearly explains the MDO object creation, MDO query creation, consume the queries using url & parameters via illuminator services.

Thank You!

entry.title: Re: How to Enable Multiple Selection Mode in a Data Table...
entry.content: Data Table control doesn't support multi-selection mode. You can use the Object Table control that supports multi-selection.

entry.title: Stop creation of maintenance work order
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement to stop create the work orders to all the equipments under a functional location.

There are 03 things we can inactivate, inactivate equipment, inactive functional location, inactive maintenance plans related to those equipments.

What is the better approach to stop the creation of maintenance work orders for this scenario.

Should I go on inactivate individual maintenance plans, should I go on inactivate each equipment under that functional location or should I just inactive the functional location?

entry.title: Rating Skills in SF Performance Form and displaying the rating in Growth Portfolio.
entry.content:
In Performance form we were able to rate Goals and Competencies ,but what was missing till now was to rate the Skills ,with Talent Intelligence Hub we can now pull the Skills in Performance form and can rate them as well in same way we were able to rate Goals and Competencies.

Note : We can rate Job specific ,Core as well as Custom skills.

Configuration Requirements:

  • Talent Intelligence Hub is enabled

Note :

  • Data in the screenshot is not real data ,it is taken from Sales demo instance.

Steps to Configure :

Configure the attribute Core skill in Talent Intelligence Hub

Navigate to Manage Talent Intelligence Hub and click on "Attributes" and then click "Create" button

1.Choose the Attribute Type as Skill from the dropdown list (Mandatory step).

2.Enter the Name of Skill (Mandatory step).

3.Enter the Description of the Skill (Optional step).

4.Choose status as Active (Mandatory step).

5.Select Tag as Core and click on Create.

New attribute of Skill type created successfully.

Configure the Core skill section in Performance form.

1.Navigate to Manage Template>Select your Performance form Template>Edit Fields and Sections>Add New Section>Select Section Type as "Attribute" and click on add.

2.Relabel the section name as per the requirement and select

  • Attribute Type as Skill
  • Section Type as Core and save.

Note : Under advance option do select "Include the ability to rate" and select the Rating option type as per client requirement.

Launch the form after making above changes to rate the PM form skills and lets see the outcome

Navigate to Performance from Home dropdown list and select our Performance Form ,we can see our newly configured "Skills Section" is visible

Providing the rating to the skill ,in our case i have given the Top rating as "3" for this skill

 

Send the form to completion using Route form to see the outcome on Employee's Growth Portfolio

Navigate to Growth Portfolio to see the Final outcome ;Rating is successfully flown to Growth Portfolio.

Hence validation successful.

In this way we can configure and rate the skills in Performance form which was not possible in past ,but in Talent Intelligence Hub enabled instance we can configure and rate both Job specific ,Core and Custom skills.

Hope this blog was helpful to our SF consultants, please do like and share the blogs with others so they can utilize this new functionality for their Clients.

Thanks

Mridul

Kindly check the screenshots below.

 

After Filter applied " on Task Summary" details of the leaves not showing... It shows the "Task tile, created by, Due On". I don't want these details, I want the leave details to be shown here under the Task Summary.

 

Kindly check and provide the solution how can I fix it?

Best Regards,

Syed

Thanks,

Vignesh

entry.title: Security by Default vs Security by Design # 2
entry.content:
In my previous article, I’ve detailed about the nuances of securing SAP systems and the debate surrounding Security by default and Security by design. Those who missed it, can have a look at the blog post using this link.

https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blogs-by-members/security-by-default-vs-security-by-design/ba-p/13593897

Now, let's further explore the imperative of adopting a “Security by design” approach within SAP environments. As mentioned, with cyber threats becoming increasingly sophisticated and pervasive, organizations must embed security considerations into every facet of SAP solutions is more critical than ever.

The Evolution of Security by Design

Wait, I know you have in your mind! If Security by Design is important, why hasn't SAP included these features as standard?

The concept of "Security by Design" has become increasingly vital to address various requirements to arrest Cyberattacks. “Security by Design” approach emphasizes integrating additional security measures in various levels of software systems and just not in the foundation. However, despite its recognized importance, some may wonder why SAP, hasn't made Security by Design a standard feature in its products?

The answer is simple!

SAP’s focus is ERP and automating and integrating various business functions, but not a core Cybersecurity function. However, SAP is bringing various solutions now starting from SAP GRC solution suite, till implementing of various frameworks such as NIST. Here is how SAP is bringing it’s various solutions to meet the NIST Cybersecurity framework:

Source: SAP

Before we understand how these solutions can be used, here are the few steps that you should implement. I am not covering this from a 7 layer perspective and as Security as the primary focus considering the “Security by Design” approach. The broad layers to be focused are:

  1. Environment
  2. System
  3. Application
  4. Processes, and
  5. Organization

Security by design emphasizes proactive risk mitigation, empowering organizations to identify and address security vulnerabilities at the earliest stages. By conducting comprehensive risk assessments and threat modeling exercises, organizations can anticipate potential security threats and implement safeguards accordingly.

Additionally, relying solely on static security measures is insufficient in combating evolving cyber threats. Security by design advocates for the implementation of adaptive defense mechanisms that can dynamically respond to emerging threats in real-time. This includes leveraging machine learning (ML) algorithms and artificial intelligence (AI) to detect anomalous behavior and pre-emptively mitigate security risks.

In conclusion, the adoption of a security by design approach is indispensable for securing SAP environments in an increasingly volatile threat landscape. By integrating security considerations into every stage of the SAP development lifecycle, organizations can mitigate risks, enhance resilience, and safeguard critical assets from cyber threats. I will provide more detailed insights into each of these levels in my next article. Stay tuned!

entry.title: Re: Transaction zapping in Sybase Replication Server
entry.content:
Answer I received from SAP PS for the question

The logic for zap command depends on the parameter "sqm_cache_enable". When we hibernate_on/ hibernate_off with this prameter enabled(on/share) does not make SQM cache to be re-loaded from stable queue(where the actual status bit of the zapped transaction changes to 32772) and the transaction got replicated to ASE2.D30. After turning off the parameter, the transaction didn't replicated to ASE2.D30. However, this is not recommended as it may affect replication performance.

So, the final conclusion here is to reboot the SRS after zapping the transaction in the queue.

entry.title: Re: Usage of sales kit CPFH and DISH in on-premise?
entry.content: Hello, still, I dont have any answer. No future release

entry.title: /630 /632 /649 /650 Provisioning Posting for the 1 company code only
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I have a requirement. Till now /630 /632 /649 /650 are being posted for 3 different Company code under Same GL. Now as per the requirement, posting should happen only for 1 Company Code and remaining company code requires SAP generated separate report of those wage type.

entry.title: Re: VC CU50 characteristic sequence in General tab
entry.content:
@Jeremy,
No, I cannot create a further interface group, as I'm using them all (9 groups + General tab).

My goal is exactly to show in the General tab (that is the one firstly accessed when entering the material configuration) the main characteristics, as all the others have been set inside the 9 interface design groups.

The main characteristics in the General tab are not that many, just 8, but I prefer to show them in a meaningful order for a user-friendly data entry.

I was hoping there is a way to establish a sequence / order to show them.

Thanks for any further help / suggestion on the topic!

entry.title: Sap Asset manager OMDO Assignment on Complex table
entry.content:
Hi Guru, i'm working on SAM 2105, i need to know how to create an oMDO that corresponding on a deep structure in S4; i tried to create and entity and its oMDO by adding in the method

  METHOD /MFND/IF_CORE_OMDO_BO_MODEL~DEFINE_BO_ENTITY_MODEL.
    et_bo_entities = VALUE #( ( tech_entity_type = 'ZMeterReading' ref_struct = 'ZAMRC_S_MRCLIENT_DATA' )
                              ).
  ENDMETHOD.

where the structure ZAMRC_S_MRCLIENT_DATA is a deep structure: but when i run my app it goes to generic error "Delta download for an Offline OData client failed."

So i'm asking if there is a specific parameter i have to set on Config Panel in my complex entity,

regards,

Nadia

Aswanth

entry.title: Re: asset book value is not coming current year
entry.content: I have the same problem with S4, in that the depreciation was posted two years ago, but it was not transferred from the book value from 2021 to 2022.

entry.title: Re: Job Relationship sync from position to people profile
entry.content:
Hi Bob, how to execute Point 2?

We have updated the matrix relationships at the positions and are unsure how to get this synced to Job info. 
Thanks for your feedback. 

Cheers Oli

entry.title: Re: SALES DOCUMENTS APPROVAL – STANDARD WORKFLOW
entry.content:
Hi  swetha_sivagnanam.

It is a nice blog and more useful.

I have implemented it and it is working fine except for one thing I'm facing a problem with, with the release task the work item comes into my inbox app without details but with the rework task the work item comes with all details.

What do you think about the reason for this problem and how can I solve it?

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP Excel Add-in ; Customization of the ribbon
entry.content:
Hi @Crombach 

Yes indeed you are able to add and remove the Default options of Excel Addin as per the administrative functions scoping under Business Role Restrictions.

But the below highlighted screenshot has nothing to do about authorization to edit the planning view. It is just that the Excel Sheet that it is currently active is not a planning view. If you create the excel sheet as planning view using the 'New View' option, other inactive options in the Planning View and Data Input Sections will be activated.

Best Regards,

'Riyaz'

entry.title: Where can I find free material to study SAP SuccessFactors Variable Pay module in depth ?
entry.content:
SAP SuccessFactors Learning

SAP SuccessFactors Compensation

entry.title: Re: Variable Pay - Basis Calculation
entry.content: I need to use base salary for basis, the requirement does not allow using annual salary. There are different frequencies for base salaries but we need to use only 12 as frequency. So the custom formula is basis = base salary * 12 * Bonus Target %

entry.title: Re: How to Enable Multiple Selection Mode in a Data Table...
entry.content:
Hi Jitendra,

Thanks for your suggestion.

I have considered the Object Table control, but it appears more like a list and doesn't seem to support displaying multiple columns to show detailed information. The Object Table control provides around 3 or 4 places where text can be bound, but we need to display more. We are developing the specifically for tablet use.

Is there any way to enhance the Object Table to display more columns, or is there another control that better supports a multi-column layout with multi-selection capabilities. We're aiming for a solution that works well on tablet devices.

Any suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Best Regards,

Vivek V

entry.title: Re: How could i see My Feed? There is an option in previo...
entry.content: Any way this was not so seemless like earlier experience. but any way change is good.. Probably somethign good hidden

entry.title: How to clear the old assets value without depreciation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

My Client wants to clear the old asset values which are never been depreciated. The asset year has not been opened since 2012. That means it closed in 2011 and asset accounting activity hasn't been done until now. So, the system doesn't allow us to depreciate or retire the old assets.

Please advise how to clear the old asset values and open the current Asset Accounting year.

Thanks in advance,

Regards,

RajPal

entry.title: Re: Analytic Model ODATA
entry.content:
Hi @irodin10 ,

Have you been able to solve the issue. 

I'm having a similar problem. I'm not able to get the analytical odata service work:

When calling 
"<datasphere host>/api/v1/dwc/consumption/analytical/SAP_CONTENT/SAP_POS_L_Analysis/SAP_POS_L_Analysis?$select=retailStorId"

I get this error:
{
"status": 500,
"message": "A server error has occurred"
}

entry.title: How to get the name and descriptions of SAP B1 table and own fields from SQL Server?
entry.content:
Hi,

I can see tables and field desriptions in query generator. It must be written in the SQL Server.

I want to use this information in my PHP code. I can see all the tables with below SQL Statement;

SELECT name FROM SYSOBJECTS WHERE xtype = 'U' ORDER by name;

But I can not see the table definitions. I see some HTML tables from forums and other sites but I want to get all these names, definitions of table and fields from SQLServer.

Where can I find this information from SQLServer?

Regards,

Mucip:)

entry.title: Re: Unable to list or upload data to SAP ObjectStore prov...
entry.content:
@RAJ137 

You can refer this blog on accessing AWS S3 Bucket

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-access-an-btp-object-store-aws-s3-bucket-from-local-desktop/ba-p/13552292

entry.title: unable to delete component from production order after running COCM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have assigned OCM profile in material master.Component deleted from BOM with change number.

Then executed COCM with that change number.It executed successfully.

But that component in production order updated with deletion indicator.That component is not removed from that order. Could you guide how to fix that.

Please note that production order is in released status.GR is not yet done.

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Plus - Gurgaon - May 2024 (H1)
entry.content: Hi Chandra Bhushan- Any seperate invitation will be sent for this event ?

entry.title: Re: ALV as default in standard transactions in purchasing, like ME2N
entry.content: Hello Lisbeth,

entry.title: Re: ALV as default in standard transactions in purchasing, like ME2N
entry.content: Hello Lisbeth, Please steps to be follow for this above create an ID parameter for this LISTU field and assign this ID parameter to the users that want it by default

entry.title: Re: Rating Skills in SF Performance Form and displaying the rating in Growth Portfolio.
entry.content: Great read. Very informative!

entry.title: Re: Read a JMS queue with a timer event
entry.content:
Maybe you can do this via 2 iflows.

The first iflow would be a jms adapter connected to start message.

In the second iflow you can schedule it using a timer and then call deploy integration flow API to call the first iflow.

 

BR,

Raihan

entry.title: Artificial Intelligence role in shaping the future of Energy Industry🌍💡
entry.content:
Problem Statement:

In this pivotal moment for the energy industry's sustainability transition, Energy Industries are adopting green practices for sustainability reporting and carbon emission and more but are presented with a range of challenges and opportunities.

Solution:

Digital technologies, notably artificial intelligence (AI), are expected to play a significant role in this transition, enabling the necessary changes for a thriving, sustainability-focused future. With Digital Technology - Generative AI are anticipated to boost these efforts, especially in domains such as customer service and technological innovation of utilities sector.

AI is set to significantly enhance energy efficiency aiding utilities companies; HOW?

Below are few ways AI can contribute to this area (but not just limited to this list):

  1. Customer Service📟: AI-powered chatbots / virtual assistants can enhance customer service (CS) by providing instant support for common queries and issues. This improves customer satisfaction while reducing the workload on human customer service agents.

  2.  Predictive maintenance of machinery🔌:

    Analyze sensor data and predict when maintenance is needed. Early detection of potential problems enables companies to minimize downtime and avert energy waste using AI.

  3. Environmental Impact Assessment🌱: AI could assess the environmental impact of energy generation and consumption. Thus, by analyzing emission data from the same AI can support sustainability initiatives and promote environmentally friendly practices within the energy sector also helping utilities make more informed decisions accordingly.

  4. Energy-Efficient Transportation🚚:

    Route optimization reduces travel time and energy use eventually aiding supply chain optimization. Not to mention the optimization of fuel consumed

  5. Carbon Emission Reduction🌐: AI models predict emissions and suggest mitigation strategies. Eventually optimizing operations, AI indirectly reduces carbon footprint.

  6. AI powered VPP (virtual power plants): A virtual power plant consists of distributed energy resources such as EV chargers, solar panels, etc. AI can orchestrate these resources, creating virtual power plants thereby enhancing grid stability and resilience.

In summary, this small blog post aims to put some light onto AI’s ability to process large datasets, learn patterns, and help make real-time informed decisions makes it a powerful tool thus contributing to a more sustainable future.

My Other Blogs:

  1. Exploring SAP BTP ABAP Environment - Step by Step blog for SAP BTP ABAP Environment (including Eclipse and ABAP instance setup). Its awesome blog with 5 YT series.

  2. SAP BTP ABAP Environment and ADT Troubleshooting Guide | SAP Blogs - SAP BTP ABAP Environment and ADT Troubleshooting Guide

  3. SAP CDS hints annotation & its application in ABAP | SAP Blogs - Hints can be used to influence preparation, optimization, and execution of SQL statements. This blog is a sample demonstration of same.

Share and Connect: Useful? like and share on social media.

Connect with me on:

  • LinkedIn > linkedin.com/in/sapparamount

  • Email > sapparamount@gmail.com

Thank you,

Pavan Golesar

entry.title: Re: time stamps in ABAP
entry.content:
Is there a way to find out Timestamp field when checking data type in Dynamic structure determination with RTTS. For Long Timestamp it shows P of Length 11 with Decimal 7 and Normal Timestamp with P of Length 8.

This is with reference to CL_ABAP_STRUCTDESCR->COMPONENTS.

entry.title: Re: Hana express downloader Options not showing
entry.content: Facing the same issue today. I hope its only a temporary issue.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: Is the Abap backend developer exam eligible for the free certificate

entry.title: Re: Product Compliance / Who is the "Supplier"? (Goods Supplier ? Supplier ? other role ?)
entry.content:
Hello Paulo

the "purchase process" links to many roles of business partners (e.g. WL, LF etc.).

The current SAP Online help does not explain: which "role" is checked. And without knowing this.. how can we (from functional point of view) maintain data in PC?

So it is not "our" defintion of the supplier which i am interested in: but which "role" is checked in the SAP process.

Any feedback is highly welcome

C.B.

entry.title: Bitget-Empfehlungscode für 2024: qp29
entry.content:
Suchen Sie nach dem Bitget-Empfehlungscode? Die neueste Version für 2024 ist qp29. Mit diesem Code erhalten Sie 30 % Rabatt auf die Handelsgebühren. Darüber hinaus können neue Bitget-Benutzer, die sich mit dem Aktionscode „qp29“ anmelden, eine exklusive Aktionsprämie im Wert von bis zu 5.005 US-Dollar erhalten.

Als Empfehlungscode fungiert der Code „qp29“ im Bitget-Empfehlungsprogramm. Durch die Eingabe dieses Codes erhalten Sie eine dauerhafte Reduzierung der Handelsgebühren sowie 30 % Rabatt auf Ihre Trades. Wenn Sie Ihren Empfehlungscode mit Ihren Freunden teilen, haben Sie außerdem die Chance, einen großzügigen Bonus von 50 % zu gewinnen. Die Verwendung dieses Codes bietet eine wertvolle Möglichkeit, Gebühren zu senken und möglicherweise Ihre Einnahmen zu steigern, indem Sie andere für die Plattform gewinnen.

Was ist der beste Bitget 2024-Empfehlungscode?
Der dringend empfohlene Bitget-Empfehlungscode ist qp29. Wenn Sie diesen Code bei der Anmeldung verwenden, erhalten Sie einen großzügigen Bonus von 5005 $. Wenn Sie Ihren Code mit Ihren Freunden teilen, haben Sie die Möglichkeit, eine riesige Provision von 50 % zu verdienen. Dies gibt Ihnen im Wesentlichen die Möglichkeit, als Willkommensbelohnung einen maximalen Anmeldebonus von bis zu 5005 $ zu erhalten. Dies ist eine großartige Möglichkeit, Ihre Handelserfahrung mit zusätzlichen Vorteilen zu erweitern und gleichzeitig andere zu ermutigen, beizutreten und ihre eigenen Belohnungen zu verdienen.

So verwenden Sie den Bitget-Empfehlungscode
Der Bitget-Empfehlungscode steht neuen Benutzern zur Verfügung, die sich noch nicht an der Börse registriert haben. Wenn Sie bereits ein Konto haben, können Sie den Empfehlungscode leider nicht verwenden. Bitget bietet jedoch mehrere andere Möglichkeiten, an Werbeaktionen teilzunehmen und Prämien zu verdienen. Schauen wir uns diese Alternativen an.

Für Bitget-Neulinge gibt es hier eine Schritt-für-Schritt-Anleitung zur Beantragung eines Empfehlungscodes:

Um zu beginnen, besuchen Sie Bitget und klicken Sie auf die blaue Schaltfläche „Anmelden“.
Geben Sie genaue Benutzerdaten an, da diese auf Einhaltung der KYC- und AML-Verfahren überprüft werden.
Wenn Sie zur Eingabe Ihres Empfehlungscodes aufgefordert werden, geben Sie qp29 ein.
Schließen Sie den Registrierungsprozess ab und führen Sie alle erforderlichen Überprüfungen durch.
Sobald alle Bedingungen erfüllt sind, können Sie den Willkommensbonus sofort erhalten.
Dieser Ansatz stellt sicher, dass neue Benutzer den Registrierungsprozess auch ohne Empfehlungscode problemlos abschließen können und nach Erfüllung der festgelegten Anforderungen einen Willkommensbonus erhalten.

Was ist der empfohlene Empfehlungscode für Bitget?
Der empfohlene Referenzcode für Bitget ist qp29. Um 30 % Rabatt auf Ihre Bitget-Provision zu erhalten, befolgen Sie einfach diese Schritte:

Registrieren Sie ein neues Konto bei Bitget.
Stellen Sie sicher, dass Sie den Bitget-Empfehlungscode qp29 verwenden.
Wie hoch ist der Empfehlungsbonus für Bitget?
Laden Sie Ihre Freunde ein, sich Bitget anzuschließen und gemeinsam einen Anteil am Empfehlungspreispool zu gewinnen! Jeder Freund, den Sie empfehlen, kann 50 US-Dollar verdienen, bis zu einem Höchstbetrag von 5.005 US-Dollar pro Benutzer. Benutzer können Freunde einladen, sich bei Bitget zu registrieren. Wenn sie alle Anforderungen erfüllen, erhalten Sie und Ihre Freunde Handelsboni von 50 $ bis zum Höchstlimit.

Wie erhalte ich den Bitget-Bonus?
Sammeln Sie täglich Punkte und tauschen Sie diese gegen USDT ein. Schließe die Herausforderung innerhalb von sieben Tagen ab, um alle Belohnungen freizuschalten. Registrieren Sie sich, um ein Willkommenspaket im Wert von 5.005 $ zu erhalten. Zahlen Sie mindestens 50 $ ein, um 200 Punkte zu sammeln. Machen Sie Ihren ersten Trade im Wert von mindestens 50 $ und verdienen Sie 500 Punkte.

Werden Handelsprovisionsrabatte automatisch angewendet?
Absolut. Sobald Sie sich mit unserem exklusiven Empfehlungscode Bitget qp29 registrieren, wird der Rabatt von 30 % automatisch angewendet. Sind keine weiteren Maßnahmen erforderlich. Tauchen Sie einfach in den Handel ein und profitieren Sie von dauerhaft 30 % Rabatt auf alle Provisionen.

entry.title: Bitget-henvisningskode for 2024: qp29
entry.content:
Leder du efter Bitget-henvisningskoden? Den seneste for 2024 er qp29. Med denne kode får du 30% rabat på handelsgebyrer. Derudover kan nye Bitget-brugere, der tilmelder sig med kampagnekoden "qp29", modtage en eksklusiv kampagnebelønning til en værdi af op til $5005.

Koden "qp29" i Bitget-henvisningsprogrammet fungerer som en henvisningskode. Ved at indtaste denne kode vil du modtage en permanent reduktion i handelsgebyrer samt 30% rabat på dine handler. Hvis du deler din henvisningskode med dine venner, har du også en chance for at vinde en generøs 50% bonus. Brug af denne kode giver en værdifuld mulighed for at reducere gebyrer og potentielt øge din indtjening ved at tiltrække andre til platformen.

Hvad er den bedste Bitget 2024-henvisningskode?
Den stærkt anbefalede Bitget-henvisningskode er qp29. Hvis du bruger denne kode, når du tilmelder dig, vil du modtage en generøs $5005 bonus. Hvis du deler din kode med dine venner, har du mulighed for at tjene en kæmpe kommission på 50%. Dette giver dig i bund og grund muligheden for at modtage en maksimal tilmeldingsbonus på op til $5005 som en velkomstbelønning. Dette er en fantastisk måde at udvide din handelsoplevelse med yderligere fordele, mens du opmuntrer andre til at deltage og tjene deres egne belønninger.

Sådan bruger du Bitget-henvisningskoden
Bitget-henvisningskoden er tilgængelig for nye brugere, der endnu ikke er registreret på børsen. Hvis du allerede har en konto, vil du desværre ikke kunne bruge henvisningskoden. Bitget tilbyder dog flere andre måder at deltage i kampagner og tjene belønninger på. Lad os se på disse alternativer.

For Bitget-nybegyndere er her en trin-for-trin guide til, hvordan man ansøger om en henvisningskode:

For at komme i gang skal du besøge Bitget og klikke på den blå "Tilmeld"-knap.
Angiv nøjagtige brugeroplysninger, da de vil blive kontrolleret for overholdelse af KYC- og AML-procedurer.
Når du bliver bedt om din henvisningskode, skal du indtaste qp29.
Fuldfør registreringsprocessen og fuldfør alle nødvendige bekræftelser.
Når alle betingelser er opfyldt, kan du straks modtage velkomstbonussen.
Denne tilgang sikrer, at nye brugere nemt kan gennemføre registreringsprocessen selv uden en henvisningskode og modtage en velkomstbonus efter at have opfyldt de fastsatte krav.

Hvad er den anbefalede henvisningskode til Bitget?
Den anbefalede henvisningskode til Bitget er qp29. For at få 30 % rabat på din Bitget-kommission skal du blot følge disse trin:

Registrer en ny konto på Bitget.
Sørg for at bruge Bitget-henvisningskoden qp29.
Hvor meget er henvisningsbonussen for Bitget?
Inviter dine venner til at deltage i Bitget og vind en del af henvisningspræmiepuljen sammen! Hver ven, du henviser, kan tjene $50, op til et maksimum på $5005 pr. bruger. Brugere kan invitere venner til at registrere sig på Bitget. Hvis de opfylder alle kravene, vil du og dine venner modtage handelsbonusser på $50 op til maksimumgrænsen.

Hvordan får jeg Bitget-bonussen?
Optjen point dagligt og veksle dem til USDT. Gennemfør udfordringen inden for syv dage for at låse op for alle belønninger. Tilmeld dig for at modtage en velkomstpakke til en værdi af $5005. Indbetal mindst $50 for at optjene 200 point. Lav din første handel til en værdi af mindst $50 og optjen 500 point.

Anvendes handelskommissionsrabatter automatisk?
Absolut. Når du registrerer dig med vores eksklusive henvisningskode Bitget qp29, vil 30% rabatten blive anvendt automatisk. Der kræves ingen yderligere handling. Du skal bare dykke ned i handel og nyde godt af en permanent 30% rabat på alle kommissioner.

entry.title: Code de parrainage Bitget pour 2024 : qp29
entry.content:
Recherchez-vous le code de parrainage Bitget ? Le dernier pour 2024 est le qp29. Avec ce code, vous bénéficiez d'une réduction de 30 % sur les frais de trading. De plus, les nouveaux utilisateurs de Bitget qui s'inscrivent avec le code promotionnel « qp29 » peuvent recevoir une récompense promotionnelle exclusive d'une valeur allant jusqu'à 5 005 $.

Le code « qp29 » dans le programme de parrainage Bitget fait office de code de parrainage. En saisissant ce code, vous bénéficierez d'une réduction permanente des frais de trading ainsi que d'une remise de 30% sur vos transactions. Si vous partagez votre code de parrainage avec vos amis, vous aurez également une chance de gagner un généreux bonus de 50 %. L'utilisation de ce code offre une opportunité précieuse de réduire les frais et potentiellement d'augmenter vos revenus en attirant d'autres personnes sur la plateforme.

Quel est le meilleur code de parrainage Bitget 2024 ?
Le code de parrainage Bitget hautement recommandé est qp29. Si vous utilisez ce code lors de votre inscription, vous recevrez un généreux bonus de 5 005 $. Si vous partagez votre code avec vos amis, vous avez la possibilité de gagner une énorme commission de 50 %. Cela vous donne essentiellement la possibilité de recevoir un bonus d'inscription maximum allant jusqu'à 5 005 $ en guise de récompense de bienvenue. C'est un excellent moyen d'élargir votre expérience de trading avec des avantages supplémentaires tout en encourageant les autres à nous rejoindre et à gagner leurs propres récompenses.

Comment utiliser le code de parrainage Bitget
Le code de parrainage Bitget est disponible pour les nouveaux utilisateurs qui ne se sont pas encore inscrits sur l'échange. Malheureusement, si vous possédez déjà un compte, vous ne pourrez pas utiliser le code de parrainage. Cependant, Bitget propose plusieurs autres façons de participer à des promotions et de gagner des récompenses. Examinons ces alternatives.

Pour les débutants Bitget, voici un guide étape par étape sur la façon de demander un code de parrainage :

Pour commencer, visitez Bitget et cliquez sur le bouton bleu « S'inscrire ».
Fournissez des détails précis sur l’utilisateur, car leur conformité aux procédures KYC et AML sera vérifiée.
Lorsque vous êtes invité à saisir votre code de parrainage, saisissez qp29.
Terminez le processus d’inscription et effectuez toutes les vérifications requises.
Une fois toutes les conditions remplies, vous pouvez immédiatement recevoir le bonus de bienvenue.
Cette approche garantit que les nouveaux utilisateurs peuvent facilement terminer le processus d'inscription même sans code de parrainage et recevoir un bonus de bienvenue après avoir rempli les conditions définies.

Quel est le code de parrainage recommandé pour Bitget ?
Le code de parrainage recommandé pour Bitget est qp29. Pour obtenir 30 % de réduction sur votre commission Bitget, suivez simplement ces étapes :

Enregistrez un nouveau compte sur Bitget.
Assurez-vous d'utiliser le code de parrainage Bitget qp29.
Quel est le montant du bonus de parrainage pour Bitget ?
Invitez vos amis à rejoindre Bitget et gagnez ensemble une part de la cagnotte de parrainage ! Chaque ami que vous parrainez peut gagner 50 $, jusqu'à un maximum de 5 005 $ par utilisateur. Les utilisateurs peuvent inviter des amis à s'inscrire sur Bitget. S'ils remplissent toutes les conditions, vous et vos amis recevrez des bonus de trading de 50 $ jusqu'à la limite maximale.

Comment puis-je obtenir le bonus Bitget ?
Gagnez des points quotidiennement et échangez-les contre des USDT. Relevez le défi dans les sept jours pour débloquer toutes les récompenses. Inscrivez-vous pour recevoir un colis de bienvenue d'une valeur de 5 005 $. Déposez au moins 50 $ pour gagner 200 points. Faites votre première transaction d'une valeur d'au moins 50 $ et gagnez 500 points.

Les réductions sur les commissions de négociation sont-elles automatiquement appliquées ?
Absolument. Une fois inscrit avec notre code de parrainage exclusif Bitget qp29, la réduction de 30 % sera appliquée automatiquement. Aucune autre action est nécessaire. Plongez simplement dans le trading et bénéficiez d'une remise permanente de 30 % sur toutes les commissions.

entry.title: Re: welcome
entry.content: Hey! I am new, glad to part of sap community

entry.title: Re: New to the SAP Community? A friend of someone already here?
entry.content: happy to join sap community

entry.title: Jongste Bitget-verwysingskode 2024: qp29
entry.content:
Op soek na die nuutste Bitget-verwysingskode? Gebruik qp29 vir 2024 om outomaties 30% afslag op handelsfooie te kry. Boonop kan nuwe gebruikers 'n welkome beloning tot $5005 ontvang

Die kode "qp29" in die Bitget-verwysingsprogram dien as 'n verwysingskode. Deur hierdie kode in te voer, sal jy 'n permanente vermindering in handelsfooie sowel as 'n 30% afslag op jou ambagte ontvang. As jy jou verwysingskode met jou vriende deel, sal jy ook 'n kans hê om 'n ruim 50% bonus te wen. Die gebruik van hierdie kode bied 'n waardevolle geleentheid om fooie te verminder en moontlik jou verdienste te verhoog deur ander na die platform te lok.

Wat is die beste Bitget 2024-verwysingskode?
Die sterk aanbevole Bitget-verwysingskode is qp29. As jy hierdie kode gebruik wanneer jy inteken, sal jy 'n ruim $5005 bonus ontvang. As jy jou kode met jou vriende deel, het jy die geleentheid om 'n groot 50% kommissie te verdien. Dit gee jou in wese die geleentheid om 'n maksimum aanmeldbonus van tot $5005 as 'n welkome beloning te ontvang. Dit is 'n goeie manier om jou handelservaring uit te brei met bykomende voordele, terwyl jy ander aanmoedig om aan te sluit en hul eie belonings te verdien.

Hoe om die Bitget-verwysingskode te gebruik
Die Bitget-verwysingskode is beskikbaar vir nuwe gebruikers wat nog nie op die beurs geregistreer het nie. Ongelukkig, as jy reeds 'n rekening het, sal jy nie die verwysingskode kan gebruik nie. Bitget bied egter verskeie ander maniere om aan promosies deel te neem en belonings te verdien. Kom ons kyk na hierdie alternatiewe.

Vir Bitget-beginners, hier is 'n stap-vir-stap gids oor hoe om aansoek te doen vir 'n verwysingskode:

Om te begin, besoek Bitget en klik op die blou "Sluit aan"-knoppie.
Verskaf akkurate gebruikerbesonderhede aangesien dit nagegaan sal word vir voldoening aan KYC- en AML-prosedures.
Wanneer vir jou verwysingskode gevra word, voer qp29 in.
Voltooi die registrasieproses en voltooi enige vereiste verifikasies.
Sodra aan alle voorwaardes voldoen is, kan jy dadelik die welkome bonus ontvang.
Hierdie benadering verseker dat nuwe gebruikers die registrasieproses maklik kan voltooi selfs sonder 'n verwysingskode en 'n welkome bonus kan ontvang nadat aan die gestelde vereistes voldoen is.

Wat is die aanbevole verwysingskode vir Bitget?
Die aanbevole verwysingskode vir Bitget is qp29. Om 30% afslag op jou Bitget-kommissie te kry, volg eenvoudig hierdie stappe:

Registreer 'n nuwe rekening op Bitget.
Maak seker dat jy die Bitget-verwysingskode qp29 gebruik.
Hoeveel is die verwysingsbonus vir Bitget?
Nooi jou vriende om by Bitget aan te sluit en wen saam 'n deel van die verwysingspryspoel! Elke vriend wat jy verwys, kan $50 verdien, tot 'n maksimum van $5005 per gebruiker. Gebruikers kan vriende nooi om op Bitget te registreer. As hulle aan al die vereistes voldoen, sal jy en jou vriende handelsbonusse van $50 ontvang tot die maksimum limiet.

Hoe kry ek die Bitget-bonus?
Verdien punte daagliks en ruil dit vir USDT. Voltooi die uitdaging binne sewe dae om alle belonings te ontsluit. Registreer om 'n welkome pakket ter waarde van $5005 te ontvang. Deponeer ten minste $50 om 200 punte te verdien. Maak jou eerste handel ten minste $50 werd en verdien 500 punte.

Word handelskommissie-afslag outomaties toegepas?
Absoluut. Sodra jy registreer met ons eksklusiewe verwysingskode Bitget qp29, sal die 30% afslag outomaties toegepas word. Geen verdere optrede is nodig nie. Duik net in handel en trek voordeel uit 'n permanente 30% afslag

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content: Hey! I am Chandraa, Nice to meet you all [glad to be part of sap community]

entry.title: Kodi i fundit i referimit Bitget 2024: qp29
entry.content:
Po kërkoni kodin më të fundit të referimit Bitget? Përdor qp29 për 2024 për të marrë automatikisht një zbritje 30% në tarifat e tregtimit. Plus, përdoruesit e rinj mund të marrin një shpërblim mirëseardhjeje deri në 5005 dollarë

Kodi "qp29" në programin e referimit Bitget vepron si një kod referimi. Duke futur këtë kod, ju do të merrni një ulje të përhershme në tarifat e tregtimit, si dhe një zbritje prej 30% në tregtitë tuaja. Nëse ndani kodin tuaj të referimit me miqtë tuaj, do të keni gjithashtu një shans për të fituar një bonus bujar 50%. Përdorimi i këtij kodi ofron një mundësi të vlefshme për të ulur tarifat dhe për të rritur potencialisht fitimet tuaja duke tërhequr të tjerët në platformë.

Cili është kodi më i mirë i referimit Bitget 2024?
Kodi i referimit shumë i rekomanduar Bitget është qp29. Nëse e përdorni këtë kod kur regjistroheni, do të merrni një bonus bujar prej $5005. Nëse ndani kodin tuaj me miqtë tuaj, ju keni mundësinë të fitoni një komision të madh prej 50%. Kjo në thelb ju jep mundësinë për të marrë një bonus maksimal regjistrimi deri në 5005 dollarë si një shpërblim mirëseardhjeje. Kjo është një mënyrë e shkëlqyer për të zgjeruar përvojën tuaj tregtare me përfitime shtesë, ndërsa inkurajoni të tjerët të bashkohen dhe të fitojnë shpërblimet e tyre.

Si të përdorni kodin e referimit Bitget
Kodi i referimit Bitget është i disponueshëm për përdoruesit e rinj që nuk janë regjistruar ende në shkëmbim. Fatkeqësisht, nëse tashmë keni një llogari, nuk do të jeni në gjendje të përdorni kodin e referimit. Sidoqoftë, Bitget ofron disa mënyra të tjera për të marrë pjesë në promovime dhe për të fituar shpërblime. Le të shohim këto alternativa.

Për fillestarët e Bitget, këtu është një udhëzues hap pas hapi se si të aplikoni për një kod referimi:

Për të filluar, vizitoni Bitget dhe klikoni butonin blu "Regjistrohu".
Jepni detaje të sakta të përdoruesit pasi ato do të kontrollohen për pajtueshmërinë me procedurat KYC dhe AML.
Kur të kërkohet kodi i referimit, fut qp29.
Përfundoni procesin e regjistrimit dhe plotësoni çdo verifikim të kërkuar.
Pasi të plotësohen të gjitha kushtet, ju mund të merrni menjëherë bonusin e mirëseardhjes.
Kjo qasje siguron që përdoruesit e rinj të mund ta përfundojnë me lehtësi procesin e regjistrimit edhe pa një kod referimi dhe të marrin një bonus mirëseardhjeje pasi plotësojnë kërkesat e përcaktuara.

Cili është kodi i rekomanduar i referimit për Bitget?
Kodi i rekomanduar i referimit për Bitget është qp29. Për të marrë 30% ulje nga komisioni juaj Bitget, thjesht ndiqni këto hapa:

Regjistroni një llogari të re në Bitget.
Sigurohuni që të përdorni kodin e referimit të Bitget qp29.
Sa është bonusi i referimit për Bitget?
Ftoni miqtë tuaj të bashkohen me Bitget dhe të fitoni së bashku një pjesë të grupit të çmimeve të referimit! Çdo mik që ju referoni mund të fitojë 50 dollarë, deri në maksimum 5005 dollarë për përdorues. Përdoruesit mund të ftojnë miqtë të regjistrohen në Bitget. Nëse i plotësojnë të gjitha kërkesat, ju dhe miqtë tuaj do të merrni bonuse tregtare prej 50$ deri në kufirin maksimal.

Si mund të marr bonusin Bitget?
Fitoni pikë çdo ditë dhe shkëmbeni ato për USDT. Përfundoni sfidën brenda shtatë ditëve për të zhbllokuar të gjitha shpërblimet. Regjistrohuni për të marrë një paketë mirëseardhjeje me vlerë 5005 dollarë. Depozoni të paktën 50 dollarë për të fituar 200 pikë. Bëni tregtinë tuaj të parë me vlerë të paktën 50 dollarë dhe fitoni 500 pikë.

A aplikohen automatikisht zbritjet e komisioneve të tregtimit?
Absolutisht. Pasi të regjistroheni me kodin tonë ekskluziv të referimit Bitget qp29, zbritja prej 30% do të zbatohet automatikisht. Nuk kërkohet asnjë veprim i mëtejshëm. Thjesht futuni në tregti dhe përfitoni nga një zbritje e përhershme prej 30%.

entry.title: Re: welcome
entry.content: Hey! I am Chandraa, Nice to meet you all [glad to be part of sap community]

entry.title: Codice di riferimento Bitget per il 2024: qp29
entry.content:
Stai cercando il codice referral Bitget? L'ultima per il 2024 è qp29. Con questo codice ottieni uno sconto del 30% sulle commissioni di negoziazione. Inoltre, i nuovi utenti Bitget che si iscrivono con il codice promozionale “qp29” possono ricevere un premio promozionale esclusivo del valore fino a $ 5005.

Il codice “qp29” nel programma di riferimento Bitget funge da codice di riferimento. Inserendo questo codice, riceverai una riduzione permanente delle commissioni di negoziazione e uno sconto del 30% sulle tue operazioni. Se condividi il tuo codice di riferimento con i tuoi amici, avrai anche la possibilità di vincere un generoso bonus del 50%. L'utilizzo di questo codice offre una preziosa opportunità per ridurre le commissioni e potenzialmente aumentare i tuoi guadagni attirando altri sulla piattaforma.

Qual è il miglior codice di riferimento Bitget 2024?
Il codice di riferimento Bitget altamente raccomandato è qp29. Se utilizzi questo codice al momento della registrazione, riceverai un generoso bonus di $ 5005. Se condividi il tuo codice con i tuoi amici, hai l'opportunità di guadagnare un'enorme commissione del 50%. Questo ti dà essenzialmente l'opportunità di ricevere un bonus di iscrizione massimo fino a $ 5005 come ricompensa di benvenuto. Questo è un ottimo modo per espandere la tua esperienza di trading con ulteriori vantaggi, incoraggiando al tempo stesso gli altri ad aderire e guadagnare i propri premi.

Come utilizzare il codice di riferimento Bitget
Il codice di riferimento Bitget è disponibile per i nuovi utenti che non si sono ancora registrati sull'exchange. Sfortunatamente, se hai già un account, non potrai utilizzare il codice referral. Tuttavia, Bitget offre molti altri modi per partecipare a promozioni e guadagnare premi. Diamo un'occhiata a queste alternative.

Per i neofiti di Bitget, ecco una guida passo passo su come richiedere un codice di riferimento:

Per iniziare, visita Bitget e fai clic sul pulsante blu "Iscriviti".
Fornisci dettagli utente accurati poiché verranno controllati per verificarne la conformità con le procedure KYC e AML.
Quando ti viene richiesto il codice di riferimento, inserisci qp29.
Completa il processo di registrazione e completa le eventuali verifiche richieste.
Una volta soddisfatte tutte le condizioni, potrai ricevere immediatamente il bonus di benvenuto.
Questo approccio garantisce che i nuovi utenti possano completare facilmente il processo di registrazione anche senza un codice di riferimento e ricevere un bonus di benvenuto dopo aver soddisfatto i requisiti stabiliti.

Qual è il codice di riferimento consigliato per Bitget?
Il codice di riferimento consigliato per Bitget è qp29. Per ottenere uno sconto del 30% sulla tua commissione Bitget, segui semplicemente questi passaggi:

Registra un nuovo account su Bitget.
Assicurati di utilizzare il codice di riferimento Bitget qp29.
Quanto costa il bonus referral per Bitget?
Invita i tuoi amici a unirsi a Bitget e vinci insieme una parte del montepremi di riferimento! Ogni amico che inviti può guadagnare $ 50, fino a un massimo di $ 5005 per utente. Gli utenti possono invitare gli amici a registrarsi su Bitget. Se soddisfano tutti i requisiti, tu e i tuoi amici riceverete bonus di trading di $50 fino al limite massimo.

Come ottengo il bonus Bitget?
Guadagna punti ogni giorno e scambiali con USDT. Completa la sfida entro sette giorni per sbloccare tutte le ricompense. Registrati per ricevere un pacchetto di benvenuto del valore di $ 5005. Deposita almeno $50 per guadagnare 200 punti. Rendi la tua prima operazione del valore di almeno $ 50 e guadagna 500 punti.

Gli sconti sulle commissioni di trading vengono applicati automaticamente?
Assolutamente. Una volta registrato con il nostro esclusivo codice referral Bitget qp29, lo sconto del 30% verrà applicato automaticamente. Non è richiesta alcuna ulteriore azione. Tuffati nel trading e beneficia di uno sconto permanente del 30% su tutte le commissioni.

entry.title: Najnoviji Bitget referentni kod 2024: qp29
entry.content:
Tražite najnoviji Bitget referentni kod? Koristite qp29 za 2024. da automatski dobijete 30% popusta na naknade za trgovanje. Osim toga, novi korisnici mogu dobiti nagradu dobrodošlice do $5005

Kod “qp29” u Bitget programu za preporuke djeluje kao referentni kod. Unošenjem ovog koda dobit ćete trajno smanjenje naknada za trgovanje kao i 30% popusta na vaše trgovine. Ako svoj kod preporuke podijelite sa svojim prijateljima, također ćete imati priliku osvojiti izdašnih 50% bonusa. Korištenje ovog koda pruža vrijednu priliku za smanjenje naknada i potencijalno povećanje vaše zarade privlačenjem drugih na platformu.

Koji je najbolji Bitget 2024 kod preporuke?
Toplo preporučeni kod Bitget preporuke je qp29. Ako koristite ovaj kod prilikom registracije, dobit ćete velikodušnih $5005 bonusa. Ako svoj kod podijelite sa prijateljima, imate priliku da zaradite ogromnih 50% provizije. Ovo vam u suštini daje priliku da dobijete maksimalni bonus za registraciju do $5005 kao nagradu dobrodošlice. Ovo je sjajan način da proširite svoje iskustvo trgovanja dodatnim pogodnostima, istovremeno ohrabrujući druge da se pridruže i zarade svoje nagrade.

Kako koristiti Bitget referentni kod
Bitget kod za preporuke dostupan je novim korisnicima koji se još nisu registrovali na berzi. Nažalost, ako već imate račun, nećete moći koristiti kod preporuke. Međutim, Bitget nudi nekoliko drugih načina za sudjelovanje u promocijama i zaradu nagrada. Pogledajmo ove alternative.

Za početnike u Bitgetu, evo vodiča korak po korak o tome kako se prijaviti za kod preporuke:

Da započnete, posjetite Bitget i kliknite na plavo dugme "Prijavi se".
Navedite tačne podatke o korisniku jer će se provjeriti usklađenost sa KYC i AML procedurama.
Kada se od vas zatraži vaš kod preporuke, unesite qp29.
Završite proces registracije i izvršite sve potrebne verifikacije.
Kada se ispune svi uslovi, odmah možete dobiti bonus dobrodošlice.
Ovaj pristup osigurava da novi korisnici mogu lako završiti proces registracije čak i bez koda preporuke i dobiti bonus dobrodošlice nakon ispunjavanja postavljenih zahtjeva.

Koji je preporučeni kod za preporuke za Bitget?
Preporučeni kod preporuke za Bitget je qp29. Da biste dobili 30% popusta na svoju Bitget proviziju, jednostavno slijedite ove korake:

Registrujte novi nalog na Bitget.
Obavezno koristite Bitget referentni kod qp29.
Koliki je bonus za preporuke za Bitget?
Pozovite svoje prijatelje da se pridruže Bitgetu i zajedno osvojite dio nagradnog fonda za preporuke! Svaki prijatelj kojeg preporučite može zaraditi 50 USD, do maksimalno 5005 USD po korisniku. Korisnici mogu pozvati prijatelje da se registruju na Bitget. Ako ispunjavaju sve uslove, vi i vaši prijatelji ćete dobiti trgovačke bonuse od $50 do maksimalnog limita.

Kako da dobijem Bitget bonus?
Zaradite bodove dnevno i zamijenite ih za USDT. Dovršite izazov u roku od sedam dana da otključate sve nagrade. Registrirajte se da biste primili paket dobrodošlice u vrijednosti od 5005 USD. Uplatite najmanje $50 da zaradite 200 poena. Neka vaša prva trgovina bude vrijedna najmanje $50 i zaradite 500 bodova.

Primjenjuju li se automatski popusti na proviziju za trgovanje?
Apsolutno. Kada se registrujete sa našim ekskluzivnim kodom preporuke Bitget qp29, automatski će se primijeniti popust od 30%. Nisu potrebne dodatne radnje. Samo uronite u trgovanje i iskoristite stalni popust od 30%.
